subject: [RFC PATCH 29/40] mm: page_reporting: walk per-superpageblock free lists

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch refactors the page reporting cycle to correctly walk per-superpageblock free lists, which were introduced by the superpage rework. The previous implementation walked an empty zone-level list, causing virtio-balloon free page reporting to become a no-op on systems with superpageblocks. The patch introduces a new function `page_reporting_cycle_list` that takes an explicit list_head and a shared budget pointer, allowing it to iterate over all superpageblocks in the zone for the requested order and memory type. The patch also holds the memory hotplug read lock around the SPB walk to prevent dangling references. A fallback path is retained for zones whose SPB array has not yet been allocated.
